name: ProjectX
long_description:
Infinity is one OS for every device. Any workflow, from anywhere.

Traditional operating systems are hardware-locked, driver-dependent, and were never built for agents. Spinning up AI agents today means wrestling with VMs, DevOps pipelines, and hard resource caps before a single workflow even runs. Every device has its own OS, its own limits, its own ceiling. The heaviest applications -- robotics simulators, CAD tools, AI workloads -- stay locked to the machines powerful enough to run them.

Infinity abstracts all of it away. Windows apps, Linux apps, and AI agents run in a single cloud-native environment -- streamed with dedicated GPU compute to any browser on any hardware, from a laptop to an Apple Watch. 

Run the heaviest apps from the lightest devices. Humans and agents share the same workspace with infinite compute and unlimited parallel workflows. One URL
one_liner: Building Infinity: the cloud OS where humans and agents work together
